metadata.description: Synthetic public-readiness gates for reviewer-facing repository hygiene.

gates.label: Unit tests
gates.reviewerValue: Core evaluation logic has executable checks.

gates.label: Synthetic demos
gates.reviewerValue: A reviewer can inspect pass, fail and blocked decisions quickly.

gates.label: Generated reports
gates.evidence: npm run report:check && npm run scorecard:check
gates.reviewerValue: Reviewer-facing artifacts are generated from source fixtures.

gates.label: Technical publication scan
gates.reviewerValue: Token-shaped secrets and configured blocklist terms are checked before publishing.

gates.label: Synthetic fixtures only
gates.reviewerValue: Public examples do not require real user, client or production data.

gates.label: Publication boundary
gates.reviewerValue: The repository states what is intentionally excluded.

gates.label: CI workflow
gates.reviewerValue: The verification suite runs on GitHub Actions for public pushes.
